_label_note: SA Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered Secretariat role-mailbox bait, public/label-only phone bait, CR/VAT/National Address/Iqama numeric fragments, URL CR/NID/Iqama fragments, Hijri Sha-ban date bait, public MOU wording, and training-roster insider-list wording. Generated placeholder/invalid KSA National ID, Iqama, and CR labels were removed from strict must_detect when current deterministic strict mode suppresses them.
_label_tier_note: SA Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

must_detect.matched_text:
Context: the Council for Market Activities (CMA) Market Conduct Bulletin MC-22-F defines MNPI as non-public issuer information material to securities; this note uses only already-announced items for Najd Securities Exchange (NSX) submission.
Issuer workflow: onboarding via Oasis Ledger and Falcon Gateway with SDAIA (Strategic Data Alignment Inter-Agency) conduit transfer limited to organization master data, not data subjects.
Field map: National ID/Iqama [masked only], Commercial Registration [CR ref only], Insider List [named roles], Contact [role mailbox]; examples: Iqama: 0000-XXXX-0000, CR: 2040-XYZ-7777, Email: disclosures@alwaha.example.
Clarification: the term “health dashboard” in Oasis Ledger refers to system uptime metrics; no medical records are processed in this flow.
Special-category PD positive: For the insider list, Mr. Faisal Al-Bari disclosed a prior cardiac surgery; treat this as health data under PDPL Art. 3 requiring explicit consent and encryption at rest.
Biometric note: Building entry uses device “Palm Vault 2.0” with biometric capability disabled; no templates are captured or stored in issuer systems.
DEI policy: The Sandstone Inclusion Charter promotes belonging and non-political conduct at work as general values statements, not as data collection.
Market disclosure check: Dividend timetable and segment rebranding were publicly announced on 1446-01-15H via the NSX portal; treat as stale and not MNPI for board briefing.
Sports metaphor: Like the Desert Falcons at halftime, compliance will pause and adjust before go-live, without touching personal playbooks.
Data transfer: Any SDAIA conduit transfer will carry only CR metadata and product SKUs; national ID/Iqama fields remain null in export schemas.
Risk controls: PDPL lawful basis recorded in the Oasis PDPL Playbook v2.1; vendor Sahara Transfer Protocol configured with data minimization, localization, and audit flags.
MNPI screening: Board minutes in scope are from prior public sessions; forward-looking pricing models (genetic algorithm prototypes) are illustr
